USB D-Byte

Compact RP2040 USB development board

Rs. 849.00

Variant pricing

Quantity

1
Documentation
Buy Now

A compact USB development board for embedded experiments and automation.

Small board, direct workflow

USB D-Byte is a thumb-drive-sized RP2040 development board designed for HID automation, embedded prototyping, learning, and security lab experiments.

It plugs directly into a USB-A port and can emulate keyboards, mass storage, and other HID devices depending on the firmware you load.

Built for education and automation

Use it for rapid microcontroller projects, payload testing in authorized labs, classroom demos, and compact automation tools.

The simple physical format makes it easy to carry, test, reflash, and reuse across development workflows.

What's in the box

USB D-Byte board.

Quick-start reference for setup and flashing.

Specifications

Technical details

Dimensions
47mm × 18mm × 8mm
Processor
Dual-core 32-bit CPU @ 133 MHz
Storage
16MB SPI Flash
Mode Switch
2-Position (Attack & Setup)
Connector
USB-A Plug
Controls
Reset & Boot Button

Use only in systems you own or have permission to test. RDH Robotics products are intended for education, research, and authorized development.
